design_lock.storage: semantic keys (dict), not numbered axes — order reorderable in docs

scope.role: file-global #!hexa strict header + ai-native { } block scope
scope.file_global_default: all strict keys on when #!hexa strict present

literal_ban.impl: parser AST walk in fn body, ~40 LOC

brace_lock.rule: first fn/if/while/for brace placement → file standard; mixing = parse error
brace_lock.ai_native_principle: system self-observes, no hardcoded K&R/Allman preference

deferred_axes.attr_naming: not now, add to hexa lint --ai-native later

tasks.subject: P1: @limit enforcement in self/hexa_full.hexa
done_subparts: loadavg_triple() + ncpus_detected() helpers (system-state readers via exec sysctl)
@limit gate injected at exec_fn pre-body (line ~8743, bit 8 = 256): singleton + load-rising-and-oversubscribed throw
active_fn_dec paired post-body (after call_stack_top decrement, line ~8973)
remaining: Rebuild stage0 to verify edits integrate
Verify no regression in existing @retry/@fallback/@guard tests

tasks.subject: P1: t51 test — @limit self-referential
test_cases_planned: singleton trip: @limit fn that calls itself → throws
normal pass: @limit fn called sequentially twice → both succeed
load trajectory: requires sysctl mock or env override to exercise

tasks.subject: P2: #!hexa strict global + ai-native block scope
P2: t52 test — ai-native syntax enforcement

rules.rule: stage/phase number ban: stageN, phaseN, pN, tN+
same-base duplication ban: foo.hexa + foo_impl.hexa + foo_utils.hexa → 1
case self-calibrate: first file locks snake/kebab/camel
parallel suffix ban — same as F-series for folders

phase_4_integration.title: hexa build integration — all rules in single CLI gate

non_negotiable_principles.no_hardcoded_constants: system state (sysctl, file observation) drives thresholds; only 0/1/-1 identity allowed
non_negotiable_principles.self_observation: system observes own state/code, derives rules
non_negotiable_principles.python_analog: enforce structurally at parse time, not as lint warnings

resume_instructions_on_session_drop.step_3: Rebuild stage0: FORCE=1 hexa scripts/rebuild_stage0.hexa (HX8 wrapper)
